description_long: A semi-circular block of pale yellow cheese with numerous small holes is presented on a light wooden cutting board. The cheese has a smooth, slightly glossy surface and is partially sliced, revealing its interior dotted with orange-yellow holes. Several thin, rectangular slices of cheese are arranged beside the main block, and a silver-bladed cheese knife with a white handle rests on the board. Two green leaves, possibly for garnish, are placed near the cheese slices. The cheese appears dense and moist, with a uniform texture and no visible rind.
description: A block of pale yellow, holey cheese is sliced on a light wooden board with a cheese knife and green garnish.
description_view_0: The cheese block is seen from above and slightly to the side, showing the unsliced end, knife, and garnish on the board.
description_view_1: The back of the cheese block is visible, with the unsliced, smooth surface facing forward and slices, knife, and garnish behind.
description_view_2: The cut face of the cheese is prominent, displaying its holey interior, with slices, knife, and garnish in the foreground.
description_view_3: The cheese is viewed from the opposite side, showing the cut face, slices, and knife laid out on the board.
